title: Add non-record 1xH100 auto precision budget experiment
author: spatnala18
quantization: calibration-driven mixed precision with greedy byte-budget promotion

data.description: Calibration-driven precision allocator that evaluates candidate tensor promotions after training, SWA, and pruning, then greedily spends bytes under a 16,000,000-byte cap.

novel_contributions: Replaces fixed mixed-precision export exceptions with a calibration-driven precision allocator
Greedily promotes tensors based on estimated quantization harm while staying under a 16MB budget
Uses a non-record exploratory 1xH100 run to document a compression-aware direction
Selected promotions were limited to blocks.9.attn.c_k.weight and blocks.9.attn.c_v.weight
